founder_feedback_closures.rationale: Phase 125 generated this accepted baseline-candidate feedback as a synthetic workflow-feedback validation fixture. It proves classification and durable decision recording, but it is not production founder feedback that should mutate the stable baseline corpus.

Phase 125 generated this accepted holdout-candidate feedback as a synthetic workflow-feedback validation fixture. It proves holdout classification and durable decision recording, but it is not production founder feedback that should mutate the holdout prompt bank.

Phase 125 generated this accepted repair-followup feedback as a synthetic workflow-feedback validation fixture. It proves repair classification and durable decision recording, but it is not production founder feedback that should enqueue a model repair.

prompt_tightening_closures.rationale: Reject this prompt-tightening candidate for stable release because it was triggered only by a low-confidence pass at the governed floor, has no unresolved findings, fresh drift is none, and changing the prompt catalog would add churn without proven user-visible failure.
